DP.484.0000:
I’m the Day-Care Man.\f
We look after the precious Pokémon
of other Trainers.\f
If you’d like us to raise your
Pokémon, have a word with my wife.
DP.484.0001:
Ah, it’s you!\f
We were raising your Pokémon,
and my goodness, were we surprised!\f
Your Pokémon was holding an Egg!\f
We don’t know how it got there,
but your Pokémon had it.\f
You do want it, don’t you?
DP.484.0002:
Ah, it’s you! Good to see you.
Your [0100,0000]’s doing just fine.
DP.484.0003:
Well then, I’ll hang on to it.
Thanks!
DP.484.0004:
You have no room for it right now...
Come back when you’ve made room.
DP.484.0005:
[0103,0000] received the Egg from
the Day-Care Man.
DP.484.0006: You take good care of it.
DP.484.0007:
By the way, I saw your [0100,0000]
cavorting with [0103,0001]’s\r
[0100,0002].\f
I may even have seen it receiving
a piece of Mail.
DP.484.0008:
If you want to pick up your Pokémon,
have a word with my wife.
DP.484.0009:
Ah, it’s you!
Good to see you!\f
Your [0100,0000] and [0100,0001]
are doing just fine.\f
DP.484.0010:
I really will keep it.
You do want this, yes?
DP.484.0011: The two seem to get along very well.
DP.484.0012: The two seem to get along.
DP.484.0013:
The two don’t seem to like each
other much.
DP.484.0014:
The two prefer to play with other
Pokémon more than with each other.
DP.484.0015:
I’m the Day-Care Lady.
We can raise Pokémon for you.\f
Would you like us to raise your
Pokémon?
DP.484.0016:
Which Pokémon should we raise for
you?\f
DP.484.0017:
Fine, we’ll raise your [0100,0000]
for a while.\f
Come back for it later.\f
DP.484.0018:
We can raise two of your Pokémon.
Would you like us to raise another?
DP.484.0019:
Ah, there you are!
My husband was looking for you.
DP.484.0022:
Do you want to take back the other
one, too?
DP.484.0024:
Ah, it’s you! Good to see you.
Now, about your Pokémon...\f
DP.484.0025:
By level, your [0100,0000] has
grown by about [0133,0001].\f
DP.484.0026:
Your Pokémon team is full.
Make room, then come see me.
DP.484.0027: Which Pokémon will you take back?
DP.484.0028:
If you want your [0100,0000] back,
it will cost $[0135,0001].
DP.484.0030:
[0103,0001] took [0100,0000] back
from the Day-Care Lady.\f
DP.484.0031:
Oh? But you only have one
Pokémon with you.\f
You can’t go off without a Pokémon.
Come back another time.
DP.484.0032: Do you want your Pokémon back?
DP.484.0033:
If you leave me that Pokémon,
what are you gonna battle with?\f
Come back another time.
DP.484.0034:
Huh? Now, now.\f
If you leave that Pokémon with
me, you’ll be left with just one.\f
You will be better off if you catch
some more, if I do say so myself.
DP.484.0035:
Now, now.
That is merely an Egg!
DP.484.0036:
Fine, we’ll raise your [0100,0000]
for a while.\f
Come back for it later.
